components.instruction:
You will be provided with a piece of text (labeled as 'text'). Your task is to classify this text into one of the following categories: Business, Sci/Tech, Sports, or World. 

To make the correct classification, carefully read and understand the content and context of the text:

- Assign 'Business' if the primary focus is on commerce, companies, markets, finance, the economy, or business leaders.
- Assign 'Sci/Tech' if the main emphasis is on science, technology, new inventions, technological trends, or companies/products primarily discussed in the context of innovation or tech industry developments.
- Assign 'Sports' if the main topic is related to athletic events, sports teams, scores, tournaments, or sporting personalities.
- Assign 'World' if the focus is on international or national events, politics, diplomacy, conflicts, or general affairs that affect countries or populations.

Pay close attention to context clues in the text, especially when companies like Apple or Microsoft are mentioned. Classify as 'Sci/Tech' if the discussion centers on technology, innovation, or tech product competition, even if prominent business figures or companies are mentioned. Reserve 'Business' for scenarios with an explicit focus on financial performance, mergers, acquisitions, economic impact, or business strategy.

Return only the category name as your response.
